hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; code_changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(bin/|config/|scripts/)' || true); [ -z "$code_changed" ] && exit 0; readme_staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^README(_en)?\.md$' || true); [ -n "$readme_staged" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"代码文件(bin/config/scripts)已变更但 README.md / README_en.md 未暂存。请检查并更新 README 后重新提交。"}'
hooks.statusMessage: 检查 README 同步状态...
